questions.text: What is data independence in DBMS?
options: Ability to change schema at one level without changing the next
questions.correctAnswer: Ability to change schema at one level without changing the next

questions.text: Which level of abstraction describes how data is actually stored?
Which key uniquely identifies a row in a table?
What is a Foreign Key used for?
options: To establish a relationship between two tables
questions.correctAnswer: To establish a relationship between two tables

questions.text: Which SQL JOIN returns all rows from both tables, joining records from the left table which match records from the right table?
What will an INNER JOIN return if there are no matches between the tables?
options: All rows from the left table
